title: Updates Page Redesign
content: The Updates page has received a redesign.
The page now includes a new filtering system, allowing users to quickly view specific categories of updates.
New features include:
• Dynamic update categories based on update types
• Filter updates without refreshing the page
• Improved organisation for announcements, changes, and improvements
• A redesigned dropdown selector matching the Joinly website style
New update categories will automatically appear when added, making future updates easier to browse.

title: Status Page
content: Joinly now has a live status page!
Here you can monitor Joinly's systems and services such as
Bot API
Dashboard
Commands
Database
Website
Discord Gateway
To view our live status page, click here.

title: Joinly Community Launch
content: The Joinly community has officially launched.
Users can now access:
Support resources
Documentation
Feature announcements
Development updates
Join the community: Joinly Support

title: Privacy & Legal Updates
content: Updated Joinly's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
These updates improve transparency regarding:
Data collection practices
Information storage
User responsibilities
Service availability
Please review the updated documents before continuing to use Joinly.
